title: 10 best herbal creams for post nasal drip
description: Rosmarinus officinalis, also known as rosemary, creams helps with post nasal drip because of its natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. The essential oils present in rosemary creams, such as camphor and eucalyptus, help to thin out mucus and reduce congestion in the nasal passages. By applying rosemary creams to the chest and nose, users can experience relief from post nasal drip, allowing them to breathe more easily and feel more comfortable. This natural remedy provid...
